name: Deborah Ross
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,203,265 for Deborah Ross in U.S. House, NC-02. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
